## Description

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Testing

<!-- How was this verified? E.g. "Installed on emulator, exercised X, confirmed Y." -->
<!-- Unit tests: ./gradlew --no-daemon clean assembleDebug testDebug -->

## Screenshot

<!--
Required for every PR:
- If this PR changes any app behavior or UI (anything visually capturable), attach a
  screenshot/recording of it working on a device or emulator.
- If there's nothing visual to show (e.g. a pure refactor, build script, or CI change),
  attach a screenshot of a successful local build instead.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] Builds and unit tests pass (`./gradlew --no-daemon clean assembleDebug testDebug`)
- [ ] Verified on an emulator/device, not just compiled
- [ ] Screenshot attached (of the behavior change, or of a successful local build if nothing is visually capturable)
- [ ] Targets the `develop` branch (see `docs/agents/release-process.md`)
